chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1370 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5294/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 25-09-2025 Mr. Muhammad Shahid, Advocate for the Petitioners Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General along with SIP Gulzar Ahmed and SIP Allah Wadhayo, Investigating Officer >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statements of Respondents No.2 and 3, whereas, Mr. Qudratullah Rajput, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5, which are taken on record. SIP Allah Wadhayo, Investigating Officer Crime No.142 of 2025 Police Station, Tando Masti Khan, District Khairpur is present and submits that final challan of the case has already been submitted before the trial Court. On such statement of the Investigating Officer, learned counsel for the Petitioners, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioners will approach the concerned trial for appropriate relief in accordance with the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
